name: Battle Survivor
desc: At the end of the Battle Phase: You can add 1 card from your GY to your hand, except "Battle Survivor", that was sent there during this Battle Phase while you controlled this face-up card. You can only use this effect of "Battle Survivor" once per turn.
mnst_eff: At the end of the Battle Phase: You can add 1 card from your GY to your hand, except "Battle Survivor", that was sent there during this Battle Phase while you controlled this face-up card. You can only use this effect of "Battle Survivor" once per turn.
eff: At the end of the Battle Phase: You can add 1 card from your GY to your hand, except "Battle Survivor", that was sent there during this Battle Phase while you controlled this face-up card. You can only use this effect of "Battle Survivor" once per turn.

sets.set: Speed Duel GX: Duelists of Shadows

misc: At the end of the Battle Phase
